name: Ngrok RDP Tunnel Detected
description: Detects the execution of the Ngrok utility for tunneling an RDP connection. Adversaries frequently use Ngrok to expose internal services, such as RDP, to the internet, bypassing traditional network security measures. The "::16777216" artifact (IPv6 loopback with a modified suffix) is a strong indicator of an RDP connection established through Ngrok.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Event ID (e.g., from TerminalServices-LocalSessionManager, TerminalServices-RemoteConnectionManager, or Security).

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address of the RDP connection, expected to contain '::%16777216'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user associated with the RDP connection (if available in the event data).

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
